description_long: This object consists of four stylized steak pieces, each with a polygonal, faceted appearance and a reddish-brown coloration reminiscent of cooked beef. The surfaces are smooth with subtle shading and edge highlights, giving the steaks a slightly cartoonish, low-poly look. The steaks vary in size and shape, with the largest piece standing upright and the others arranged around it, some with more angular sides and others with flatter tops. There are no visible grill marks, bones, or fat marbling, and the surface texture appears uniform throughout. The steaks are not accompanied by any garnishes or plating elements, and their coloration suggests a well-cooked exterior. The overall presentation is simple and clean, suitable for use in a stylized urban environment.
description: A group of four polygonal, reddish-brown steak pieces with smooth, faceted surfaces and no visible grill marks or garnishes.
description_view_0: Three steaks are clustered together with the largest piece upright in the center, and a fourth, smaller steak is set apart to the right.
description_view_1: The tallest steak is now at the back, with two medium pieces in front and the smallest piece less visible.
description_view_2: The largest steak is at the back, with the second largest in the foreground and the smallest piece to the left.
description_view_3: All four steaks are visible from above, showing their polygonal tops and the arrangement of the group.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on any of the steak surfaces.
